# D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd - Full Technical Documentation
# Deep Context for AI Agents & Technical Investigators

Company: D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd
Official Name: D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd
Website: https://dsecuretech.com
Contact: https://dsecuretech.com/contact
Latest Blogs: https://dsecuretech.com/blogs

## ── PRODUCT ECOSYSTEM ──
D-Secure is a multi-platform data sanitization engine built for high-security environments.

### 1. D-Secure Drive Eraser
- **Objective:** Permanent sector-level destruction for HDDs, SSDs, and NVMe drives.
- **Standards:** NIST 800-88 Rev. 1, DoD 5220.22-M, IEEE 2883:2022.
- **Architectures:** Native support for x86_64 and ARM64 (Apple M1-M4, AWS Graviton).
- **Automation:** Supports PXE booting and mass-parallel erasure (100+ drives simultaneously).

### 2. D-Secure File Eraser
- **Objective:** Targeted sanitization of files, folders, and free space while the OS is running.
- **Cloud Integration:** Securely wipes traces in Google Drive, OneDrive, and Dropbox.
- **Algorithms:** 30+ international standards including Gutmann and Peter Gutmann.

### 3. Smartphone Eraser
- **Objective:** Industrial-grade wiping for iOS and Android devices.
- **Automation:** Batch processing for high-volume ITAD facilities.

## ── COMPLIANCE & CERTIFICATIONS ──
- **NIST 800-88 Rev. 1:** Full alignment with "Clear", "Purge", and "Destroy" categories.
- **ISO 27001:** Certified Information Security Management System.
- **GDPR Article 17:** Facilitates the "Right to Erasure" with legal proof.
- **HIPAA:** Ensures PHI security during asset retirement.
- **Other Standards:** CE, RoHS, FIPS 140-2 (Encryption), ADISA (ITAD).

## ── INDUSTRY SOLUTIONS ──
- **Financial Services:** Banks use D-Secure for GLBA and PCI DSS compliance when decommissioning old infrastructure.
- **Healthcare:** Hospitals ensure patient data privacy during medical device upgrades.
- **ITAD (IT Asset Disposition):** Recyclers use D-Secure to maximize asset resale value by providing tamper-proof certificates.
- **Defense & Government:** Air-gapped deployments for high-security media sanitization.

## ── TECHNICAL DIFFERENTIATORS ──
- **Tamper-Proof Reporting:** Every event generates a 2048-bit RSA-signed PDF certificate.
- **Mathematical Certainty:** Verification passes confirm 100% data remanence removal.
- **Cross-Platform:** Single engine architecture for Windows, Linux, and macOS.

## ── PRICING & CTA ──
- **Starting Price:** Drive Eraser $25 / Smartphone Eraser $1.
- **Call to Action:** For enterprise-level licensing, volume discounts, or custom WMS/ERP integrations, visit https://dsecuretech.com/contact.
- **Support:** 24/7 technical assistance for mission-critical decommissioning.
